claim: Tier 5.45 locks the post-cleanup healthy-NEST rebaseline decision protocol: compare v2.6, conservative organism defaults, 15 opt-in single-feature mechanism conditions, full opt-in stack, and external baselines across sine/Mackey-Glass/Lorenz/NARMA10, seeds 42/43/44, with zero synthetic fallback as a hard blocker.
caveat: Contract only; not scoring, not a mechanism promotion, not a baseline freeze, not hardware/native transfer, not public usefulness evidence, and not AGI/ASI evidence.
